subject: Caterpie — a small green caterpillar Pokemon on leafy ground
description: A small green caterpillar Pokemon sits in a simple outdoor setting on green ground cover. The creature has a segmented round green body, large circular eyes with a yellow sclera, a short curved antenna-like yellow horn on its head, and a light yellow underside. The overall style is the classic original-era Ken Sugimori flat illustration with a soft plain background in yellow-greens. The pose is static and frontal, characteristic of the Base Set illustration style.
foreground: small green caterpillar Pokemon on grass
